basic_details.job_title: OSC Guntur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Case Worker, Multi-purpose Staff Posts
basic_details.short_information: One Stop Centre Guntur (OSC Guntur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 3 Case Worker Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 18-07-2026.

age_limit.details: The age limit for all posts is between 18 to 42 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in law/social work/sociology/social science/psychology with 3 years of experience for Case Worker. Literate with knowledge/experience for Multi-purpose Staff.
qualification.details: Case Worker: Bachelor's degree in law / social work / sociology / social science / psychology and minimum three years of experience of working on women related relevant domains in a Government or Non-Government project / programme. Multi-purpose Staff: Literate with knowledge / experience of working in the relevant domain. Preference will be given to an individual with a High School degree.

salary_details.pay_scale: Case Worker: Rs.19,500/- per month, Multi-purpose Staff: Rs.13,000/- per month
salary_details.details: Case Worker: Rs.19,500/- per month Multi-purpose Staff: Rs.13,000/- per month

selection_process: Selection will be based on merit
and an interview conducted by the District Level Selection Committee.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for OSC Guntur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://guntur.ap.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

Bachelor's degree in law/social work/sociology/social science/psychology with 3 years of experience for Case Worker. Literate with knowledge/experience for Multi-purpose Staff.

content_sections.heading: OSC Guntur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the OSC Guntur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download OSC Guntur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: OSC Guntur Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Case Worker: Bachelor's degree in law / social work / sociology / social science / psychology and minimum three years of experience of working on women related relevant domains in a Government or Non-Government project / programme. Multi-purpose Staff: Literate with knowledge / experience of working in the relevant domain. Preference will be given to an individual with a High School degree.

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: OSC Guntur Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: The age limit for all posts is between 18 to 42 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government norms.

content_sections.heading: OSC Guntur Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Case Worker: Rs.19,500/- per month Multi-purpose Staff: Rs.13,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: OSC Guntur Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on merit, relevant experience, and an interview conducted by the District Level Selection Committee.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for OSC Guntur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://guntur.ap.gov.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OSC Guntur recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the OSC Guntur recruitment is 18th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Case Worker post?
faq.answer: For the Case Worker position, candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in law, social work, sociology, social science, or psychology, along with a minimum of three years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all the posts is between 18 to 42 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the existing government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will the selection be made for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on the candidate's merit, relevant experience, and a personal interview conducted by the District Level Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or in person.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Case Worker post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Case Worker post will receive a salary of Rs. 19,500/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Multi-purpose Staff post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Multi-purpose Staff post will receive a salary of Rs. 13,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Guntur district, which is https://guntur.ap.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.
